project_type: Telegram bot using aiogram 3.x with FSM, APScheduler, matplotlib, openpyxl
build_command: python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('main.py', doraise=True); py_compile.compile('database.py', doraise=True); py_compile.compile('config.py', doraise=True)"
verification_instructions: 1. Run python syntax check on all .py files. 2. Verify imports resolve (where possible). 3. Confirm .env.example exists with proper placeholders.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode means no pip install. Libraries assumed available at deploy time.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot pip install packages. Python 3.11 available. Write code assuming python-dotenv, reportlab are available at runtime. Focus on correct code generation.
contribution_requirements: Single branch (main), one initial commit. No CI/CD, no contributing guide.
key_patterns: Bot uses aiogram 3.x dispatcher pattern with FSM states. Database uses SQLAlchemy async with asyncpg. Hardcoded BOT_TOKEN, ADMIN_ID in main.py, DATABASE_URL in database.py. Tariff calculation in config.py. Houses (max 5) per user, readings per house/utility. ReplyKeyboardMarkup for main menu, InlineKeyboardMarkup for actions. All text currently in Uzbek (latin).
directory_structure: Flat structure: main.py (bot entry point ~300 lines), config.py (tariff logic), database.py (SQLAlchemy models + CRUD), drop_tables.py (utility). New files to create: .env, .env.example, locales/ directory, pdf_report.py, sms_parser.py
